title: eruca sativa var. eriocarpa
intro: Eruca sativa var. eriocarpa, also known as garden rocket, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is a type of leafy green vegetable that has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against cell damage. Eruca sativa var. eriocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or capsule, and its health benefits include reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function.
